arts.ttl: Eric Garcia says Barca showed ‘incredible mentality’ to down Benfica
arts.sum: The team has shown an incredible mentality. The team has not lost face in the game at any time,” he told Movistar.

arts.ttl: Man United transfer news: Barcelona chief Deco speaks out about potential Marcus Rashford move
arts.sum: Barcelona sporting director Deco speaks out amid reports the club are interested in signing Marcus Rashford on loan from Manchester United.

arts.ttl: ‘Crazy game!’ - Flick wowed by Barca’s comeback
arts.sum: The visitors looked set for defeat at the Estadio da Luz but managed to turn the game around and win it thanks to a late strike from Raphinha. “I don’t think I’ve ever experienced a comeback like this.

arts.ttl: Bonkers match in Benfica doesn’t paper over the cracks for Barca
arts.sum: For a player of such experience, it was a calamitous first half to say the least, however, by close of play he somehow managed to redeem himself after pulling off some match-winning saves. Jules Kounde largely had a game to forget despite having the requisite experience to be doing a much more accomplished job than he managed in Portugal.

arts.ttl: Match winner Raphinha baited by Benfica 'insults'
arts.sum: Match winner Raphinha said Benfica insults sparked a scuffle in the tunnel after his stoppage-time goal earned Barcelona a remarkable 5-4 comeback win at the Estádio da Luz in the Champions League on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Champions League scores: Barcelona pull off miraculous comeback while Atalanta boost last-16 hopes
arts.sum: Atletico climbed to third in the table after beating Leverkusen

arts.ttl: Benfica 4-5 Barcelona: Multiple records set in astonishing evening at the Estadio da Luz
arts.sum: Multiple Champions League records have been set in Barcelona's astonishing 5-4 win over Benfica this evening.

arts.ttl: Slot praises referee after Barcelona's fightback against Benfica despite it costing Liverpool
arts.sum: Barcelona’s spectacular fightback against Benfica on Tuesday meant Liverpool would have to wait another week to be confirmed winner of the league phase of the new look Champions League. But manager Arne Slot was full of praise for referee Danny Makkelie playing so much stoppage time in the 5-4 win for Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Champions League round-up: Barcelona snatch last-gasp winner in nine-goal thriller to join Liverpool in last 16
arts.sum: Barcelona recorded an astonishing 5-4 victory at Benfica that booked the Spanish giants' place in the last 16 of the Champions League. And the drama was not done there as, seconds after Benfica appealed for a penalty, Raphinha netted in the sixth minute of added time - with his winner confirmed after a lengthy VAR review.

arts.ttl: Watch the Champions League Analyst Desk's Hilarious Reaction to Raphinha's Winner for Barcelona
arts.sum: Raphinha's thrilling game winner for Barcelona had pundits Jamie Carragher and Micah Richards going crazy.
